<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>MS Automobile Service — Votre projet de A à Z</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Barlow:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --blue-deep: #0a1628;
    --blue-dark: #0d1f3c;
    --blue-mid: #1a3a6b;
    --blue-accent: #1e5eff;
    --blue-bright: #4d8eff;
    --blue-light: #e8f0ff;
    --gold: #f0b429;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --gray-light: #f4f6fb;
    --gray: #8899b0;
    --text: #1a2a3a;
    --danger: #e53e3e;
    --success: #38a169;
  }

- { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

body {
font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif;
background: var(–blue-deep);
color: var(–white);
min-height: 100vh;
overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* ===== PAGES ===== */
.page { display: none; min-height: 100vh; }
.page.active { display: block; }

/* ===== NAV ===== */
nav {
position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 1000;
background: rgba(10,22,40,0.95);
backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.2);
padding: 0 40px;
height: 70px;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
}

.nav-logo {
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
text-decoration: none;
cursor: pointer;
}

.nav-logo-icon {
width: 42px; height: 42px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–blue-accent), var(–blue-bright));
border-radius: 10px;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
font-size: 20px;
box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(30,94,255,0.4);
}

.nav-logo-text { line-height: 1; }
.nav-logo-text .brand { font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 20px; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(–white); }
.nav-logo-text .sub { font-size: 10px; color: var(–blue-bright); letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; }

.nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }

.nav-link {
padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px;
font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500;
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
color: var(–gray); background: transparent; border: none;
font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif;
}
.nav-link:hover { color: var(–white); background: rgba(30,94,255,0.1); }
.nav-link.active { color: var(–white); background: rgba(30,94,255,0.15); }

.nav-btn {
padding: 9px 20px; border-radius: 8px;
font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600;
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif;
border: none;
}

.btn-outline {
background: transparent;
border: 1.5px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.5) !important;
color: var(–blue-bright);
}
.btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(–blue-accent) !important; background: rgba(30,94,255,0.1); }

.btn-primary {
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–blue-accent), #3b82f6);
color: var(–white);
box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(30,94,255,0.3);
}
.btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(30,94,255,0.4); }

.nav-user {
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
}
.nav-user-info { text-align: right; }
.nav-user-info .name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; }
.nav-user-info .role {
font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px;
padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px;
display: inline-block; margin-top: 2px;
}
.role-client { background: rgba(30,94,255,0.2); color: var(–blue-bright); }
.role-employe { background: rgba(240,180,41,0.2); color: var(–gold); }
.role-dirigeant { background: rgba(56,161,105,0.2); color: #68d391; }

/* ===== HERO ===== */
.hero {
min-height: 100vh;
display: flex; align-items: center;
position: relative; overflow: hidden;
padding: 120px 80px 80px;
}

.hero-bg {
position: absolute; inset: 0;
background:
radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 70% 50%, rgba(30,94,255,0.12) 0%, transparent 60%),
radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 40% at 20% 80%, rgba(30,94,255,0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
linear-gradient(180deg, var(–blue-deep) 0%, #061020 100%);
}

.hero-grid {
position: absolute; inset: 0; opacity: 0.04;
background-image:
linear-gradient(rgba(30,94,255,1) 1px, transparent 1px),
linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(30,94,255,1) 1px, transparent 1px);
background-size: 60px 60px;
}

.hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; max-width: 650px; }

.hero-badge {
display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
background: rgba(30,94,255,0.15);
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.3);
border-radius: 50px; padding: 6px 16px;
font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 2px;
text-transform: uppercase; color: var(–blue-bright);
margin-bottom: 28px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s ease both;
}

.hero-title {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: clamp(52px, 7vw, 90px);
font-weight: 900; line-height: 0.95;
letter-spacing: -1px;
margin-bottom: 8px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.1s ease both;
}

.hero-title span { color: var(–blue-accent); }

.hero-slogan {
font-size: 18px; font-weight: 300;
color: var(–blue-bright); letter-spacing: 3px;
text-transform: uppercase;
margin-bottom: 24px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.2s ease both;
}

.hero-desc {
font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.7;
color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
max-width: 500px; margin-bottom: 40px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.3s ease both;
}

.hero-cta {
display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.4s ease both;
}

.cta-btn {
padding: 15px 32px; border-radius: 10px;
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px;
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.25s; border: none;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.cta-primary {
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–blue-accent), #3b82f6);
color: white;
box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(30,94,255,0.4);
}
.cta-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 35px rgba(30,94,255,0.5); }

.cta-secondary {
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15) !important;
color: white;
}
.cta-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); }

.hero-stats {
position: absolute; right: 80px; bottom: 80px;
display: flex; gap: 40px;
animation: fadeUp 0.6s 0.5s ease both;
}

.stat { text-align: center; }
.stat-num {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 42px; font-weight: 900;
color: var(–blue-accent); line-height: 1;
}
.stat-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(–gray); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; margin-top: 4px; }

/* ===== SERVICES ===== */
.section {
padding: 100px 80px;
background: var(–blue-deep);
}

.section-alt { background: #061020; }

.section-header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 60px; }
.section-tag {
display: inline-block;
font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 3px;
text-transform: uppercase; color: var(–blue-accent);
margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.section-title {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 48px; font-weight: 800;
line-height: 1.1;
}
.section-title span { color: var(–blue-accent); }

.services-grid {
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
gap: 24px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
}

.service-card {
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.15);
border-radius: 16px; padding: 36px;
transition: all 0.3s; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.service-card::before {
content: ‘’; position: absolute;
top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(–blue-accent), transparent);
opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s;
}
.service-card:hover { border-color: rgba(30,94,255,0.4); transform: translateY(-4px); }
.service-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; }

.service-icon {
width: 56px; height: 56px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(30,94,255,0.2), rgba(30,94,255,0.1));
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.3);
border-radius: 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
font-size: 26px; margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.service-title { font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.service-desc { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); }

/* ===== VEHICLES ===== */
#page-vehicles { background: var(–blue-deep); padding-top: 70px; }

.vehicles-header {
background: linear-gradient(180deg, #061020 0%, var(–blue-deep) 100%);
padding: 80px;
text-align: center;
}

.vehicles-filters {
display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
margin-top: 30px;
}

.filter-btn {
padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 50px;
font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
color: var(–gray);
font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif;
}
.filter-btn:hover, .filter-btn.active {
background: rgba(30,94,255,0.2);
border-color: var(–blue-accent);
color: var(–white);
}

.vehicles-grid {
display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr));
gap: 24px; padding: 60px 80px; max-width: 1400px; margin: 0 auto;
}

.vehicle-card {
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.15);
border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden;
transition: all 0.3s; cursor: pointer;
}
.vehicle-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: rgba(30,94,255,0.4); box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }

.vehicle-img {
width: 100%; height: 200px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(30,94,255,0.1), rgba(10,22,40,0.8));
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
font-size: 70px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}

.vehicle-badge {
position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px;
padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 6px;
font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px;
}
.badge-new { background: rgba(56,161,105,0.9); color: white; }
.badge-occasion { background: rgba(240,180,41,0.9); color: #1a1a1a; }

.vehicle-info { padding: 20px; }
.vehicle-brand {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.vehicle-model { font-size: 14px; color: var(–gray); margin-bottom: 12px; }

.vehicle-specs {
display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.spec {
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
}

.vehicle-price {
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); padding-top: 16px;
}
.price-num {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: var(–blue-bright);
}
.price-currency { font-size: 14px; color: var(–gray); }

.contact-btn {
padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 8px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–blue-accent), #3b82f6);
border: none; color: white;
font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif;
}
.contact-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.05); }

.empty-state {
grid-column: 1/-1;
text-align: center; padding: 80px;
color: var(–gray);
}
.empty-state .icon { font-size: 60px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
.empty-state h3 { font-size: 22px; margin-bottom: 8px; color: white; }

/* ===== MODAL / FORMS ===== */
.modal-overlay {
position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 2000;
background: rgba(0,0,0,0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 20px;
}
.modal-overlay.open { display: flex; }

.modal {
background: var(–blue-dark);
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.25);
border-radius: 20px; padding: 40px;
width: 100%; max-width: 480px;
position: relative;
animation: scaleIn 0.25s ease both;
max-height: 90vh; overflow-y: auto;
}

.modal-wide { max-width: 640px; }

.modal-close {
position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px;
width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px;
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: none;
color: var(–gray); font-size: 18px;
cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
transition: all 0.2s;
}
.modal-close:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: white; }

.modal-title {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.modal-sub { font-size: 14px; color: var(–gray); margin-bottom: 28px; }

.form-group { margin-bottom: 18px; }
.form-label { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }

.form-input, .form-select, .form-textarea {
width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px;
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
border: 1.5px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.2);
border-radius: 10px; color: white;
font-size: 15px; font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif;
transition: border-color 0.2s; outline: none;
}
.form-input:focus, .form-select:focus, .form-textarea:focus {
border-color: var(–blue-accent);
background: rgba(30,94,255,0.08);
}
.form-select option { background: var(–blue-dark); }
.form-textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 90px; }

.form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }

.form-submit {
width: 100%; padding: 14px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–blue-accent), #3b82f6);
border: none; border-radius: 10px;
color: white; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700;
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase;
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(30,94,255,0.3);
margin-top: 8px;
}
.form-submit:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(30,94,255,0.4); }

.form-switch {
text-align: center; margin-top: 20px;
font-size: 14px; color: var(–gray);
}
.form-switch a { color: var(–blue-bright); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; }

.alert {
padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px;
font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 16px;
display: none;
}
.alert.show { display: block; }
.alert-error { background: rgba(229,62,62,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(229,62,62,0.3); color: #fc8181; }
.alert-success { background: rgba(56,161,105,0.15); border: 1px solid rgba(56,161,105,0.3); color: #68d391; }

/* ===== DASHBOARD EMPLOYE ===== */
#page-dashboard { background: var(–blue-deep); padding-top: 70px; }

.dashboard-wrap { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 50px 40px; }

.dashboard-header {
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
margin-bottom: 40px; flex-wrap: gap;
}

.dash-title {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 38px; font-weight: 800;
}
.dash-title span { color: var(–blue-accent); }

.dash-add-btn {
padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 10px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–blue-accent), #3b82f6);
border: none; color: white;
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px;
text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer;
box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(30,94,255,0.3);
transition: all 0.2s;
}
.dash-add-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); }

.dash-vehicles-list { display: grid; gap: 16px; }

.dash-vehicle-row {
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.15);
border-radius: 14px; padding: 20px 24px;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 20px;
transition: all 0.2s;
}
.dash-vehicle-row:hover { border-color: rgba(30,94,255,0.3); }

.dash-v-icon { font-size: 36px; }
.dash-v-info { flex: 1; }
.dash-v-name { font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; }
.dash-v-details { font-size: 13px; color: var(–gray); margin-top: 4px; }

.dash-v-price {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: var(–blue-bright);
}

.dash-v-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; }

.icon-btn {
width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; transition: all 0.2s;
}
.icon-btn:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); transform: scale(1.1); }
.icon-btn.delete:hover { background: rgba(229,62,62,0.2); border-color: rgba(229,62,62,0.4); }

/* ===== ADMIN ===== */
#page-admin { background: var(–blue-deep); padding-top: 70px; }

.admin-wrap { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 50px 40px; }

.admin-title {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 38px; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.admin-sub { color: var(–gray); margin-bottom: 40px; }

.admin-tabs {
display: flex; gap: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
border-radius: 12px; padding: 4px; margin-bottom: 32px;
width: fit-content;
}

.admin-tab {
padding: 10px 24px; border-radius: 9px;
font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600;
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; border: none;
background: transparent; color: var(–gray);
font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif;
}
.admin-tab.active { background: var(–blue-mid); color: white; }

.admin-panel { display: none; }
.admin-panel.active { display: block; }

.users-table {
width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.15);
border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden;
}

.users-table th {
background: rgba(30,94,255,0.1);
padding: 14px 20px; text-align: left;
font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700;
text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(–blue-bright);
}

.users-table td {
padding: 16px 20px;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
font-size: 14px;
}

.users-table tr:hover td { background: rgba(30,94,255,0.05); }

.status-select {
padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px;
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.2);
color: white; font-size: 13px;
cursor: pointer; font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif;
}
.status-select option { background: var(–blue-dark); }

.save-status-btn {
padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 6px;
background: rgba(56,161,105,0.2);
border: 1px solid rgba(56,161,105,0.4);
color: #68d391; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s;
font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif;
}
.save-status-btn:hover { background: rgba(56,161,105,0.3); }

/* ===== CONTACT ===== */
.contact-section {
padding: 100px 80px;
background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(–blue-deep), #061020);
}

.contact-grid {
display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
gap: 80px; max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; align-items: start;
}

.contact-info h2 {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 46px; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.contact-info h2 span { color: var(–blue-accent); }
.contact-info p { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.7; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55); margin-bottom: 36px; }

.contact-items { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; }

.contact-item {
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
}
.contact-item-icon {
width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px;
background: rgba(30,94,255,0.15);
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.25);
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.contact-item-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(–gray); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; }
.contact-item-value { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2px; }

.contact-form-box {
background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
border: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.15);
border-radius: 20px; padding: 40px;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */
footer {
background: #020c18;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.1);
padding: 50px 80px 30px;
}

.footer-top {
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start;
margin-bottom: 40px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 40px;
}

.footer-brand .brand-name {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.footer-brand p { font-size: 14px; color: var(–gray); max-width: 260px; line-height: 1.6; }

.footer-links h4 {
font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase;
letter-spacing: 2px; color: var(–blue-bright); margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.footer-links ul { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
.footer-links li { font-size: 14px; color: var(–gray); cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s; }
.footer-links li:hover { color: white; }

.footer-bottom {
border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
padding-top: 24px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
font-size: 13px; color: var(–gray);
}

/* ===== ANIMATIONS ===== */
@keyframes fadeUp {
from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes scaleIn {
from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95); }
to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
}

/* ===== TOAST ===== */
.toast {
position: fixed; bottom: 30px; right: 30px; z-index: 9999;
padding: 16px 24px; border-radius: 12px;
font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
transform: translateY(100px); opacity: 0;
transition: all 0.3s ease;
max-width: 360px;
}
.toast.show { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
.toast-success { background: #1a3a2a; border: 1px solid rgba(56,161,105,0.4); color: #68d391; }
.toast-error { background: #3a1a1a; border: 1px solid rgba(229,62,62,0.4); color: #fc8181; }

/* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
nav { padding: 0 20px; }
.nav-links .nav-link { display: none; }
.hero { padding: 100px 24px 120px; }
.hero-stats { right: 24px; bottom: 30px; gap: 24px; }
.stat-num { font-size: 30px; }
.section { padding: 60px 24px; }
.vehicles-grid { padding: 40px 24px; }
.contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
.contact-section { padding: 60px 24px; }
footer { padding: 40px 24px 24px; }
.footer-top { flex-direction: column; }
.dashboard-wrap, .admin-wrap { padding: 30px 20px; }
.vehicles-header { padding: 40px 20px; }
.form-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
</style>

</head>
<body>

<!-- TOAST -->

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<!-- NAV -->

<nav id="navbar">
  <div class="nav-logo" onclick="showPage('home')">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="MS Automobile" style="height:48px;width:auto;filter:brightness(0) invert(1);">
    <div class="nav-logo-text">
      <div class="brand">MS AUTOMOBILE</div>
      <div class="sub">Service</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
    <button class="nav-link active" onclick="showPage('home')">Accueil</button>
    <button class="nav-link" onclick="showPage('vehicles')">Véhicules</button>
    <button class="nav-link" onclick="scrollToContact()">Contact</button>
    <!-- Staff only -->
    <button class="nav-link staff-only" onclick="showPage('dashboard')" style="display:none">📋 Annonces</button>
    <button class="nav-link admin-only" onclick="showPage('admin')" style="display:none">⚙️ Admin</button>
  </div>
  <div id="navAuth">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
      <button class="nav-btn btn-outline" onclick="openModal('loginModal')">Connexion</button>
      <button class="nav-btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal('registerModal')">Créer un compte</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="navUser" style="display:none">
    <div class="nav-user">
      <div class="nav-user-info">
        <div class="name" id="navUserName"></div>
        <span class="role" id="navUserRole"></span>
      </div>
      <button class="nav-btn btn-outline" onclick="logout()" style="margin-left:8px">Déconnexion</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- ==================== PAGE HOME ==================== -->

<div class="page active" id="page-home">

  <!-- HERO -->

  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-bg"></div>
    <div class="hero-grid"></div>
    <div class="hero-content">
      <div class="hero-badge" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="MS Automobile" style="height:32px;filter:brightness(0) invert(1);"> Service Automobile Premium</div>
      <h1 class="hero-title">MS<br><span>Automobile</span><br>Service</h1>
      <p class="hero-slogan">Votre projet de A à Z</p>
      <p class="hero-desc">Nous trouvons le véhicule de vos rêves ou vendons le vôtre à votre place. Une équipe dédiée, une expertise reconnue, des résultats garantis.</p>
      <div class="hero-cta">
        <button class="cta-btn cta-primary" onclick="showPage('vehicles')">🚗 Voir les véhicules</button>
        <button class="cta-btn cta-secondary" onclick="scrollToContact()">Nous contacter</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">500+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Véhicules vendus</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">98%</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Satisfaction</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat">
        <div class="stat-num">10+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Ans d'exp.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- SERVICES -->

  <section class="section section-alt">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-tag">Nos services</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">Tout ce dont vous avez<br>besoin, <span>en un seul endroit</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="services-grid">
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">🔍</div>
        <h3 class="service-title">Recherche de véhicule</h3>
        <p class="service-desc">Vous nous dites ce que vous voulez, nous trouvons le véhicule parfait pour vous. Budget, modèle, options — on s'occupe de tout.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">💼</div>
        <h3 class="service-title">Vente à votre place</h3>
        <p class="service-desc">Confiez-nous votre véhicule et nous le vendons au meilleur prix. Annonces, visites, négociation — vous n'avez rien à faire.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">📋</div>
        <h3 class="service-title">Gestion administrative</h3>
        <p class="service-desc">Transfert de propriété, immatriculation, contrôle technique — toutes les démarches gérées de A à Z par notre équipe.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">🛡️</div>
        <h3 class="service-title">Inspection & Expertise</h3>
        <p class="service-desc">Chaque véhicule de notre parc est inspecté et certifié. Achetez en toute confiance avec notre garantie de qualité.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">💰</div>
        <h3 class="service-title">Financement</h3>
        <p class="service-desc">Besoin d'un financement ? Nous vous accompagnons pour trouver la meilleure solution adaptée à votre situation.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="service-card">
        <div class="service-icon">🔄</div>
        <h3 class="service-title">Reprise & Échange</h3>
        <p class="service-desc">Vous voulez changer de véhicule ? Obtenez une estimation gratuite et échangez votre ancien véhicule contre un nouveau.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- POURQUOI NOUS -->

  <section class="section">
    <div class="section-header">
      <div class="section-tag">Pourquoi nous choisir</div>
      <h2 class="section-title">L'excellence automobile<br><span>à votre service</span></h2>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:20px;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;">
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:32px 20px;">
        <div style="font-size:40px;margin-bottom:12px;">⚡</div>
        <h4 style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;">Réponse rapide</h4>
        <p style="font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);line-height:1.6;">Sous 24h pour toute demande</p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:32px 20px;">
        <div style="font-size:40px;margin-bottom:12px;">🤝</div>
        <h4 style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;">Accompagnement</h4>
        <p style="font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);line-height:1.6;">De A à Z, on reste à vos côtés</p>
      </div>
      <div style="display:none"></div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:32px 20px;">
        <div style="font-size:40px;margin-bottom:12px;">💎</div>
        <h4 style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;">Qualité certifiée</h4>
        <p style="font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);line-height:1.6;">Véhicules inspectés et garantis</p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;padding:32px 20px;">
        <div style="font-size:40px;margin-bottom:12px;">🔒</div>
        <h4 style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;">100% sécurisé</h4>
        <p style="font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);line-height:1.6;">Transactions sûres et transparentes</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CONTACT -->

  <section class="contact-section" id="contactSection">
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div class="contact-info">
        <div class="section-tag">Contact</div>
        <h2>Parlons de votre <span>projet</span></h2>
        <p>Que ce soit pour acheter, vendre ou simplement obtenir des informations, notre équipe est disponible pour vous accompagner.</p>
        <div class="contact-items">
          <div class="contact-item">
            <div class="contact-item-icon">📞</div>
            <div>
              <div class="contact-item-label">Téléphone</div>
              <div class="contact-item-value">07 59 18 46 15</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="contact-item">
            <div class="contact-item-icon">📧</div>
            <div>
              <div class="contact-item-label">Email</div>
              <div class="contact-item-value">msauto.service67@gmail.com</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="contact-item">
            <div class="contact-item-icon">📍</div>
            <div>
              <div class="contact-item-label">Adresse</div>
              <div class="contact-item-value">Bas-Rhin et alentours</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="contact-item">
            <div class="contact-item-icon">🕐</div>
            <div>
              <div class="contact-item-label">Horaires</div>
              <div class="contact-item-value">Lun-Dim : 9h - 22h</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="contact-form-box">
        <h3 style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px;">Envoyez-nous un message</h3>
        <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:24px;">Nous vous répondons sous 24h</p>
        <div class="form-row">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Prénom</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="Jean">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Nom</label>
            <input class="form-input" type="text" placeholder="Dupont">
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Email</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="email" placeholder="jean@exemple.com">
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Sujet</label>
          <select class="form-select">
            <option>Recherche de véhicule</option>
            <option>Vendre mon véhicule</option>
            <option>Demande d'information</option>
            <option>Autre</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group">
          <label class="form-label">Message</label>
          <textarea class="form-textarea" placeholder="Décrivez votre projet..."></textarea>
        </div>
        <button class="form-submit" onclick="showToast('Message envoyé ! Nous vous répondrons sous 24h.','success')">Envoyer le message</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- FOOTER -->

  <footer>
    <div class="footer-top">
      <div class="footer-brand">
        <div class="brand-name" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="MS Automobile" style="height:36px;filter:brightness(0) invert(1);"> MS AUTOMOBILE SERVICE</div>
        <p>Votre partenaire de confiance pour tous vos projets automobiles. De A à Z, on s'occupe de tout.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-links">
        <h4>Navigation</h4>
        <ul>
          <li onclick="showPage('home')">Accueil</li>
          <li onclick="showPage('vehicles')">Véhicules</li>
          <li onclick="scrollToContact()">Contact</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-links">
        <h4>Services</h4>
        <ul>
          <li>Recherche de véhicule</li>
          <li>Vente à votre place</li>
          <li>Financement</li>
          <li>Reprise & Échange</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-bottom">
      <span>© 2025 MS Automobile Service. Tous droits réservés.</span>
      <span style="color:var(--blue-bright)">Votre projet de A à Z</span>
    </div>
  </footer>
</div>

<!-- ==================== PAGE VEHICLES ==================== -->

<div class="page" id="page-vehicles">
  <div class="vehicles-header">
    <div class="section-tag">Notre parc automobile</div>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:52px;font-weight:900;">Nos <span style="color:var(--blue-accent)">véhicules</span> disponibles</h1>
    <p style="color:var(--gray);margin-top:12px;font-size:16px;">Tous nos véhicules sont inspectés et certifiés par notre équipe</p>
    <div class="vehicles-filters">
      <button class="filter-btn active" onclick="filterVehicles('all',this)">Tous</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterVehicles('neuf',this)">Neuf</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterVehicles('occasion',this)">Occasion</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterVehicles('suv',this)">SUV</button>
      <button class="filter-btn" onclick="filterVehicles('berline',this)">Berline</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="vehicles-grid" id="vehiclesGrid"></div>
  <div style="text-align:center;padding:0 0 60px;">
    <button class="cta-btn cta-secondary" onclick="scrollToContact();showPage('home')" style="margin:0 auto;">
      📞 Vous ne trouvez pas ? Contactez-nous
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ==================== PAGE DASHBOARD (STAFF) ==================== -->

<div class="page" id="page-dashboard">
  <div class="dashboard-wrap">
    <div class="dashboard-header">
      <div>
        <h1 class="dash-title">Gestion des <span>annonces</span></h1>
        <p style="color:var(--gray);margin-top:4px;">Gérez les véhicules disponibles à la vente</p>
      </div>
      <button class="dash-add-btn" onclick="openModal('addVehicleModal')">+ Ajouter un véhicule</button>
    </div>
    <div class="dash-vehicles-list" id="dashVehiclesList"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ==================== PAGE ADMIN ==================== -->

<div class="page" id="page-admin">
  <div class="admin-wrap">
    <h1 class="admin-title">⚙️ Panneau d'administration</h1>
    <p class="admin-sub">Gestion complète des utilisateurs et du contenu</p>

```
<div class="admin-tabs">
  <button class="admin-tab active" onclick="switchAdminTab('users',this)">👥 Utilisateurs</button>
  <button class="admin-tab" onclick="switchAdminTab('stats',this)">📊 Statistiques</button>
</div>

<div class="admin-panel active" id="adminPanel-users">
  <table class="users-table" id="usersTable">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th>Nom</th>
        <th>Email</th>
        <th>Date inscription</th>
        <th>Statut actuel</th>
        <th>Modifier</th>
        <th>Action</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody id="usersTableBody"></tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<div class="admin-panel" id="adminPanel-stats">
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:20px;margin-bottom:30px;">
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.15);border-radius:14px;padding:24px;">
      <div style="font-size:36px;font-weight:800;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;color:var(--blue-bright)" id="statUsers">0</div>
      <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);margin-top:4px;">Utilisateurs total</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.15);border-radius:14px;padding:24px;">
      <div style="font-size:36px;font-weight:800;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;color:var(--gold)" id="statVehicles">0</div>
      <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);margin-top:4px;">Véhicules en ligne</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.15);border-radius:14px;padding:24px;">
      <div style="font-size:36px;font-weight:800;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;color:#68d391" id="statEmployes">0</div>
      <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);margin-top:4px;">Employés</div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.15);border-radius:14px;padding:24px;">
      <div style="font-size:36px;font-weight:800;font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;color:#fc8181" id="statDirigeants">0</div>
      <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);margin-top:4px;">Dirigeants</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

  </div>
</div>

<!-- ==================== MODALS ==================== -->

<!-- LOGIN MODAL -->

<div class="modal-overlay" id="loginModal">
  <div class="modal">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('loginModal')">✕</button>
    <h2 class="modal-title">Connexion</h2>
    <p class="modal-sub">Accédez à votre espace MS Automobile</p>
    <div class="alert alert-error" id="loginError"></div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Email</label>
      <input class="form-input" type="email" id="loginEmail" placeholder="votre@email.com">
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Mot de passe</label>
      <input class="form-input" type="password" id="loginPassword" placeholder="••••••••">
    </div>
    <button class="form-submit" onclick="login()">Se connecter</button>
    <div class="form-switch">Pas encore de compte ? <a onclick="closeModal('loginModal');openModal('registerModal')">Créer un compte</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- REGISTER MODAL -->

<div class="modal-overlay" id="registerModal">
  <div class="modal">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('registerModal')">✕</button>
    <h2 class="modal-title">Créer un compte</h2>
    <p class="modal-sub">Rejoignez MS Automobile Service</p>
    <div class="alert alert-error" id="registerError"></div>
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Prénom</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="text" id="regFirstName" placeholder="Jean">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Nom</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="text" id="regLastName" placeholder="Dupont">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Email</label>
      <input class="form-input" type="email" id="regEmail" placeholder="jean@email.com">
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Téléphone</label>
      <input class="form-input" type="tel" id="regPhone" placeholder="07 59 18 46 15">
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Mot de passe</label>
      <input class="form-input" type="password" id="regPassword" placeholder="Minimum 6 caractères">
    </div>
    <button class="form-submit" onclick="register()">Créer mon compte</button>
    <div class="form-switch">Déjà un compte ? <a onclick="closeModal('registerModal');openModal('loginModal')">Se connecter</a></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ADD VEHICLE MODAL -->

<div class="modal-overlay" id="addVehicleModal">
  <div class="modal modal-wide">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('addVehicleModal')">✕</button>
    <h2 class="modal-title" id="vehicleModalTitle">Ajouter une annonce</h2>
    <p class="modal-sub">Remplissez les informations du véhicule</p>
    <input type="hidden" id="editVehicleId">
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Marque</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="text" id="vBrand" placeholder="Toyota, BMW, Audi...">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Modèle</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="text" id="vModel" placeholder="Corolla, Série 3...">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Année</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="number" id="vYear" placeholder="2023" min="1990" max="2025">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Prix ($)</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="number" id="vPrice" placeholder="25000">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Kilométrage</label>
        <input class="form-input" type="text" id="vKm" placeholder="45 000 km">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Carburant</label>
        <select class="form-select" id="vFuel">
          <option>Essence</option>
          <option>Diesel</option>
          <option>Électrique</option>
          <option>Hybride</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-row">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Catégorie</label>
        <select class="form-select" id="vCategory">
          <option value="berline">Berline</option>
          <option value="suv">SUV</option>
          <option value="coupe">Coupé</option>
          <option value="break">Break</option>
          <option value="autre">Autre</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">État</label>
        <select class="form-select" id="vCondition">
          <option value="neuf">Neuf</option>
          <option value="occasion">Occasion</option>
        </select>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Description</label>
      <textarea class="form-textarea" id="vDesc" placeholder="Options, état général, historique..."></textarea>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label class="form-label">Icône (emoji du véhicule)</label>
      <input class="form-input" type="text" id="vEmoji" placeholder="🚗" maxlength="4">
    </div>
    <button class="form-submit" onclick="saveVehicle()">Publier l'annonce</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- VEHICLE DETAIL MODAL -->

<div class="modal-overlay" id="vehicleDetailModal">
  <div class="modal modal-wide">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('vehicleDetailModal')">✕</button>
    <div id="vehicleDetailContent"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ==================== DATA STORE ====================
let db = {
  users: [
    { id: 1, firstName: 'Admin', lastName: 'MS', email: 'admin@msauto.com', password: 'admin123', role: 'dirigeant', phone: '+1 514 000 0000', createdAt: '2024-01-15' },
    { id: 2, firstName: 'Marie', lastName: 'Lambert', email: 'marie@msauto.com', password: 'employe123', role: 'employe', phone: '+1 514 111 1111', createdAt: '2024-03-10' }
  ],
  vehicles: [
    { id: 1, brand: 'BMW', model: 'Série 3 320i', year: 2023, price: 45000, km: '12 000 km', fuel: 'Essence', category: 'berline', condition: 'neuf', emoji: '🚘', desc: 'Véhicule neuf, full options, toit ouvrant, cuir.', createdAt: '2024-05-01' },
    { id: 2, brand: 'Toyota', model: 'RAV4 AWD', year: 2022, price: 38500, km: '28 000 km', fuel: 'Hybride', category: 'suv', condition: 'occasion', emoji: '🚙', desc: 'Excellent état, révision complète, garantie 1 an.', createdAt: '2024-05-10' },
    { id: 3, brand: 'Audi', model: 'A4 Quattro', year: 2021, price: 42000, km: '45 000 km', fuel: 'Essence', category: 'berline', condition: 'occasion', emoji: '🏎️', desc: 'Sportline, pack S-Line, entretien suivi chez concessionnaire.', createdAt: '2024-06-01' },
    { id: 4, brand: 'Mercedes', model: 'GLC 300', year: 2023, price: 62000, km: '5 000 km', fuel: 'Essence', category: 'suv', condition: 'neuf', emoji: '🚐', desc: 'AMG Line, financement disponible, livraison sous 48h.', createdAt: '2024-06-15' }
  ],
  nextUserId: 3,
  nextVehicleId: 5
};

let currentUser = null;
let currentFilter = 'all';

// ==================== NAVIGATION ====================
function showPage(page) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('page-' + page).classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l => l.classList.remove('active'));
  window.scrollTo(0, 0);

  if (page === 'vehicles') renderVehicles();
  if (page === 'dashboard') {
    if (!currentUser || (currentUser.role !== 'employe' && currentUser.role !== 'dirigeant')) {
      showPage('home'); showToast('Accès réservé au personnel.', 'error'); return;
    }
    renderDashboard();
  }
  if (page === 'admin') {
    if (!currentUser || currentUser.role !== 'dirigeant') {
      showPage('home'); showToast('Accès réservé aux dirigeants.', 'error'); return;
    }
    renderAdmin();
  }
}

function scrollToContact() {
  showPage('home');
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.getElementById('contactSection').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  }, 100);
}

// ==================== AUTH ====================
function login() {
  const email = document.getElementById('loginEmail').value.trim();
  const password = document.getElementById('loginPassword').value;
  const user = db.users.find(u => u.email === email && u.password === password);

  if (!user) {
    showAlert('loginError', 'Email ou mot de passe incorrect.');
    return;
  }

  currentUser = user;
  updateNavForUser();
  closeModal('loginModal');
  showToast(`Bienvenue, ${user.firstName} ! 👋`, 'success');
}

function register() {
  const firstName = document.getElementById('regFirstName').value.trim();
  const lastName = document.getElementById('regLastName').value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('regEmail').value.trim();
  const phone = document.getElementById('regPhone').value.trim();
  const password = document.getElementById('regPassword').value;

  if (!firstName || !lastName || !email || !password) {
    showAlert('registerError', 'Veuillez remplir tous les champs obligatoires.'); return;
  }
  if (password.length < 6) {
    showAlert('registerError', 'Le mot de passe doit contenir au moins 6 caractères.'); return;
  }
  if (db.users.find(u => u.email === email)) {
    showAlert('registerError', 'Un compte avec cet email existe déjà.'); return;
  }

  const newUser = {
    id: db.nextUserId++,
    firstName, lastName, email, phone, password,
    role: 'client',
    createdAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
  };
  db.users.push(newUser);
  currentUser = newUser;
  updateNavForUser();
  closeModal('registerModal');
  showToast(`Compte créé avec succès ! Bienvenue ${firstName} 🎉`, 'success');
}

function logout() {
  currentUser = null;
  updateNavForUser();
  showPage('home');
  showToast('Vous êtes déconnecté.', 'success');
}

function updateNavForUser() {
  const navAuth = document.getElementById('navAuth');
  const navUser = document.getElementById('navUser');
  const staffOnly = document.querySelectorAll('.staff-only');
  const adminOnly = document.querySelectorAll('.admin-only');

  if (currentUser) {
    navAuth.style.display = 'none';
    navUser.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('navUserName').textContent = `${currentUser.firstName} ${currentUser.lastName}`;
    const roleEl = document.getElementById('navUserRole');
    roleEl.textContent = getRoleLabel(currentUser.role);
    roleEl.className = `role role-${currentUser.role}`;

    const isStaff = currentUser.role === 'employe' || currentUser.role === 'dirigeant';
    staffOnly.forEach(el => el.style.display = isStaff ? 'block' : 'none');
    adminOnly.forEach(el => el.style.display = currentUser.role === 'dirigeant' ? 'block' : 'none');
  } else {
    navAuth.style.display = 'block';
    navUser.style.display = 'none';
    staffOnly.forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
    adminOnly.forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
  }
}

function getRoleLabel(role) {
  return { client: 'Client', employe: 'Employé', dirigeant: 'Dirigeant' }[role] || role;
}

// ==================== VEHICLES ====================
function renderVehicles(filter) {
  if (filter !== undefined) currentFilter = filter;
  const grid = document.getElementById('vehiclesGrid');
  let vehicles = db.vehicles;

  if (currentFilter !== 'all') {
    vehicles = vehicles.filter(v =>
      v.condition === currentFilter || v.category === currentFilter
    );
  }

  if (vehicles.length === 0) {
    grid.innerHTML = `<div class="empty-state"><div class="icon">🔍</div><h3>Aucun véhicule trouvé</h3><p>Essayez un autre filtre ou contactez-nous pour une recherche personnalisée.</p></div>`;
    return;
  }

  grid.innerHTML = vehicles.map(v => `
    <div class="vehicle-card" onclick="showVehicleDetail(${v.id})">
      <div class="vehicle-img">
        <span style="font-size:80px">${v.emoji || '🚗'}</span>
        <span class="vehicle-badge badge-${v.condition}">${v.condition === 'neuf' ? 'Neuf' : 'Occasion'}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="vehicle-info">
        <div class="vehicle-brand">${v.brand} ${v.model}</div>
        <div class="vehicle-model">${v.year} • ${v.category}</div>
        <div class="vehicle-specs">
          <span class="spec">📏 ${v.km}</span>
          <span class="spec">⛽ ${v.fuel}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="vehicle-price">
          <div>
            <div class="price-num">${Number(v.price).toLocaleString('fr-CA')}</div>
            <div class="price-currency">$ CAD</div>
          </div>
          <button class="contact-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();contactForVehicle('${v.brand} ${v.model}')">Contacter</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

function filterVehicles(filter, btn) {
  currentFilter = filter;
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  renderVehicles();
}

function showVehicleDetail(id) {
  const v = db.vehicles.find(v => v.id === id);
  if (!v) return;
  document.getElementById('vehicleDetailContent').innerHTML = `
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:20px;">
      <span style="font-size:90px">${v.emoji || '🚗'}</span>
    </div>
    <h2 style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:900;margin-bottom:4px;">${v.brand} ${v.model}</h2>
    <p style="color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:20px;">${v.year} • ${v.category} • <span style="color:var(--blue-bright);font-weight:600">${v.condition === 'neuf' ? 'Neuf' : 'Occasion'}</span></p>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px;">
      <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;"><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gray);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px">Kilométrage</div><div style="font-weight:700;margin-top:4px">${v.km}</div></div>
      <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;"><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--gray);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px">Carburant</div><div style="font-weight:700;margin-top:4px">${v.fuel}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(30,94,255,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(30,94,255,0.2);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:20px;">
      <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:4px">Description</div>
      <p style="font-size:15px;line-height:1.6">${v.desc || 'Aucune description.'}</p>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);padding-top:20px;">
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--gray)">Prix</div>
        <div style="font-family:'Barlow Condensed',sans-serif;font-size:36px;font-weight:900;color:var(--blue-bright)">${Number(v.price).toLocaleString('fr-CA')} $</div>
      </div>
      <button class="form-submit" style="width:auto;padding:14px 28px" onclick="contactForVehicle('${v.brand} ${v.model}');closeModal('vehicleDetailModal')">📞 Nous contacter</button>
    </div>
  `;
  openModal('vehicleDetailModal');
}

function contactForVehicle(name) {
  closeModal('vehicleDetailModal');
  showPage('home');
  setTimeout(() => {
    document.getElementById('contactSection').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
    showToast(`Contactez-nous pour le ${name}`, 'success');
  }, 200);
}

// ==================== DASHBOARD ====================
function renderDashboard() {
  const list = document.getElementById('dashVehiclesList');
  if (db.vehicles.length === 0) {
    list.innerHTML = `<div class="empty-state"><div class="icon">📋</div><h3>Aucune annonce</h3><p>Ajoutez votre premier véhicule.</p></div>`;
    return;
  }
  list.innerHTML = db.vehicles.map(v => `
    <div class="dash-vehicle-row">
      <div class="dash-v-icon">${v.emoji || '🚗'}</div>
      <div class="dash-v-info">
        <div class="dash-v-name">${v.brand} ${v.model}</div>
        <div class="dash-v-details">${v.year} • ${v.km} • ${v.fuel} • <span style="text-transform:capitalize">${v.condition}</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="dash-v-price">${Number(v.price).toLocaleString('fr-CA')} $</div>
      <div class="dash-v-actions">
        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="editVehicle(${v.id})" title="Modifier">✏️</button>
        <button class="icon-btn delete" onclick="deleteVehicle(${v.id})" title="Supprimer">🗑️</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

function saveVehicle() {
  const id = document.getElementById('editVehicleId').value;
  const brand = document.getElementById('vBrand').value.trim();
  const model = document.getElementById('vModel').value.trim();
  const year = document.getElementById('vYear').value;
  const price = document.getElementById('vPrice').value;
  const km = document.getElementById('vKm').value.trim();
  const fuel = document.getElementById('vFuel').value;
  const category = document.getElementById('vCategory').value;
  const condition = document.getElementById('vCondition').value;
  const desc = document.getElementById('vDesc').value.trim();
  const emoji = document.getElementById('vEmoji').value.trim() || '🚗';

  if (!brand || !model || !year || !price) {
    showToast('Veuillez remplir au moins la marque, le modèle, l\'année et le prix.', 'error'); return;
  }

  if (id) {
    const v = db.vehicles.find(v => v.id === parseInt(id));
    if (v) Object.assign(v, { brand, model, year: parseInt(year), price: parseFloat(price), km, fuel, category, condition, desc, emoji });
    showToast('Annonce modifiée avec succès !', 'success');
  } else {
    db.vehicles.push({ id: db.nextVehicleId++, brand, model, year: parseInt(year), price: parseFloat(price), km, fuel, category, condition, desc, emoji, createdAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] });
    showToast('Annonce ajoutée avec succès ! 🎉', 'success');
  }

  closeModal('addVehicleModal');
  renderDashboard();
}

function editVehicle(id) {
  const v = db.vehicles.find(v => v.id === id);
  if (!v) return;
  document.getElementById('vehicleModalTitle').textContent = 'Modifier l\'annonce';
  document.getElementById('editVehicleId').value = v.id;
  document.getElementById('vBrand').value = v.brand;
  document.getElementById('vModel').value = v.model;
  document.getElementById('vYear').value = v.year;
  document.getElementById('vPrice').value = v.price;
  document.getElementById('vKm').value = v.km;
  document.getElementById('vFuel').value = v.fuel;
  document.getElementById('vCategory').value = v.category;
  document.getElementById('vCondition').value = v.condition;
  document.getElementById('vDesc').value = v.desc || '';
  document.getElementById('vEmoji').value = v.emoji || '🚗';
  openModal('addVehicleModal');
}

function deleteVehicle(id) {
  if (!confirm('Supprimer cette annonce ?')) return;
  db.vehicles = db.vehicles.filter(v => v.id !== id);
  renderDashboard();
  showToast('Annonce supprimée.', 'success');
}

// ==================== ADMIN ====================
function renderAdmin() {
  renderUsersTable();
  updateStats();
}

function renderUsersTable() {
  const tbody = document.getElementById('usersTableBody');
  tbody.innerHTML = db.users.map(u => `
    <tr>
      <td style="font-weight:600">${u.firstName} ${u.lastName}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--gray)">${u.email}</td>
      <td style="color:var(--gray)">${u.createdAt}</td>
      <td><span class="role role-${u.role}" style="display:inline-block">${getRoleLabel(u.role)}</span></td>
      <td>
        <select class="status-select" id="roleSelect-${u.id}">
          <option value="client" ${u.role==='client'?'selected':''}>Client</option>
          <option value="employe" ${u.role==='employe'?'selected':''}>Employé</option>
          <option value="dirigeant" ${u.role==='dirigeant'?'selected':''}>Dirigeant</option>
        </select>
      </td>
      <td>
        <button class="save-status-btn" onclick="saveUserRole(${u.id})">✓ Sauvegarder</button>
      </td>
    </tr>
  `).join('');
}

function saveUserRole(id) {
  const user = db.users.find(u => u.id === id);
  if (!user) return;
  const newRole = document.getElementById(`roleSelect-${id}`).value;
  user.role = newRole;
  if (currentUser && currentUser.id === id) {
    currentUser.role = newRole;
    updateNavForUser();
  }
  renderUsersTable();
  updateStats();
  showToast(`Statut de ${user.firstName} mis à jour : ${getRoleLabel(newRole)}`, 'success');
}

function updateStats() {
  document.getElementById('statUsers').textContent = db.users.length;
  document.getElementById('statVehicles').textContent = db.vehicles.length;
  document.getElementById('statEmployes').textContent = db.users.filter(u => u.role === 'employe').length;
  document.getElementById('statDirigeants').textContent = db.users.filter(u => u.role === 'dirigeant').length;
}

function switchAdminTab(tab, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.admin-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.admin-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('adminPanel-' + tab).classList.add('active');
  if (tab === 'stats') updateStats();
}

// ==================== MODALS ====================
function openModal(id) {
  // Reset vehicle form
  if (id === 'addVehicleModal') {
    document.getElementById('vehicleModalTitle').textContent = 'Ajouter une annonce';
    document.getElementById('editVehicleId').value = '';
    ['vBrand','vModel','vYear','vPrice','vKm','vDesc','vEmoji'].forEach(f => document.getElementById(f).value = '');
    document.getElementById('vFuel').value = 'Essence';
    document.getElementById('vCategory').value = 'berline';
    document.getElementById('vCondition').value = 'occasion';
  }
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('open');
}

function closeModal(id) {
  document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('open');
}

// Close on overlay click
document.querySelectorAll('.modal-overlay').forEach(overlay => {
  overlay.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (e.target === overlay) overlay.classList.remove('open');
  });
});

// ==================== UTILITIES ====================
function showAlert(id, msg) {
  const el = document.getElementById(id);
  el.textContent = msg;
  el.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(() => el.classList.remove('show'), 4000);
}

function showToast(msg, type = 'success') {
  const toast = document.getElementById('toast');
  toast.textContent = (type === 'success' ? '✓ ' : '✕ ') + msg;
  toast.className = `toast toast-${type} show`;
  setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('show'), 3500);
}

// ==================== INIT ====================
renderVehicles();
</script>

</body>
</html>
